description: Style Note Slip into unparalleled comfort in these flip flops from lotto. With soft straps and a cushioned footbed, this flip flop comes with an arty upper that makes it a stylish buy. Product Details White flip flop with thong style white synthetic straps with branding appliqued on the strap and a synthetic toe separator Soft footbed with branding embossed on the heel Durable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs Material and Care Rubber Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
